paragraphs.text:
The No.4 is our workhorse splitting axe — built to halve seasoned hardwood with a single committed swing.
      Each head is forged from Swedish high-carbon steel and finished with a hand-ground convex bevel that
      bites cleanly and releases without binding. The straight-grain American hickory handle is shaped in
      our Ballarat workshop and rubbed with three coats of raw linseed oil for grip you can trust in cold,
      wet conditions. Comes wrapped in a vegetable-tanned leather sheath.
Magnesium core, jute tinder, leather lanyard
Hand-stitched leather, fits No.4 head perfectly
Coarse 180 / fine 400, fits axes and machetes
Outdoor and bushcraft goods built to outlast the user. Designed and assembled in Ballarat, Victoria since 2009.
